description:
mDNS Browser

mDNS Browser
What's Changed
:sparkles: New Features
- #827 feat: add command line option to enable logging to file @hrzlgnm
:bug: Bug Fixes
- #840 fix: Improve error handling to avoid crashing due to panics @hrzlgnm
- #846, #659  fix: Ignore invalid service types when browsing service types @hrzlgnm
- #848 fix: Make metrics visible again by not using log_fn! macro, a regression introduced in #824 @hrzlgnm
- #850 Revert "fix(deps): update rust crate mdns-sd to v0.13.4 (#845)" @hrzlgnm
🧰 Maintenance
- #831 chore(debugging): enabled building debug symbols @hrzlgnm
:recycle: Refactor
- #823 refactor: De-duplicate selecting CSS class for desktop/mobile @hrzlgnm
- #824, #825 refactor: Split components into modules @hrzlgnm
:arrow_up: Dependency Updates
- #819 fix(deps): update rust crate uuid to v1.16.0 @renovate[bot]
- #820 chore(deps): update dependency trunk to v0.21.9 @renovate[bot]
- #821 fix(deps): update rust crate tauri-plugin-updater to v2.6.1 @renovate[bot]
- #822 chore(deps): lock file maintenance @renovate[bot]
- #830 chore(deps): update actions/upload-artifact action to v4.6.2 @renovate[bot]
- #832 chore(deps): update actions/upload-artifact action to v4.6.2 @renovate[bot]
- #834 fix(deps): update rust crate leptos to v0.7.8 @renovate[bot]
- #835 fix(deps): update rust crate leptos_meta to v0.7.8 @renovate[bot]
- #837 chore(deps): lock file maintenance @renovate[bot]
- #836 chore(deps): update dependency tauri-cli to v2.4.0 @renovate[bot]
- #839 fix(deps): update rust crate log to v0.4.27 @renovate[bot]
- #844 chore(deps): update crate-ci/typos action to v1.30.3 @renovate[bot]
- #838 chore(deps): lock file maintenance @renovate[bot]
- #845 fix(deps): update rust crate mdns-sd to v0.13.4 @renovate[bot]
Auditable binaries since v0.8.x
The binaries built for desktop targets are now all build in auditable mode using cargo-auditable.
For information on how to audit the binaries see UsageAttested build artifacts since v0.8.x
The build artifacts are now attested. Attestations information about the binaries is available here. For more information and details on how to verify those, see Verifying artifact attestations with the GitHub CLI
